calls.name: Tracy Bingaman, PA-C
calls.outcome: Peer connection. Robert Arledge referral. Podcast open door (2-3 wks).
calls.next_action: Await Robert intro from Tracy. Check back Apr 22 if no movement.

calls.name: Kaci Hardsock, PA-C
calls.role: CT Surgery PA / National Student Advisor
calls.outcome: Strong peer connection. Beta reviewer for Course 1 confirmed. Key pain: tribal knowledge leaves with the lead APP. Differentiation flag: Course 2 sounded like APACVS content — need stronger sales copy angle.
calls.next_action: Follow up post-return Apr 26 with Teachable access link.

calls.name: Mitesh J. Patel, MBA, MSHS, PA-C
calls.role: CV & Thoracic Surgery PA — Baylor Scott & White
calls.outcome: Verbal yes — pending COO sign-off. Said 'if it was up to me, I'd already say yes.' Pricing ($2,500) landed clean. On PTO week of Apr 14.
calls.next_action: Wait for COO reply. Check in May 12 if no response.

pre_travel_checklist.text: Mitesh call executed + case seed filed

strategy_office.thesis: The only system for building and leading high-performing cardiac surgery APP teams — with zero turnover as the proof point.
strategy_office.current_nonnegotiable: Course 1 pre-launch May 5–11 — all recording + upload complete before May 12. ElevenLabs resets Apr 24 — 15 Course 2 videos resume automatically. Mitesh COO approval — follow up May 12 if silent.

cost_estimate.notes: Teachable Builder $828/yr (paid). ElevenLabs $22/mo. AI build costs ~$300–500. Most cost already incurred. Revenue target: $249 early bird → $399 standard.
10 of 25 AI videos built. 15 blocked until Apr 24. On-camera modules (1, 6.3, 7.3, 7.4, 8) recorded by Pol post-travel. Pricing: $399 EB / $499 std / $749–899 cohort / $3,500/yr institutional.
One-pager + Calendly already live ($0). Outreach is time only. Revenue target: $3,000–10,000 per engagement. Highest ROI of any phase.

items.text: Kaci Hardsock call — Apr 8 ✅ (peer validator, Course 1 beta reviewer)
Mitesh Patel call — Apr 9 ✅ (verbal yes, COO approval pending)

cost_estimate.notes: 25 questions structured. Validate demand with course audience first. AI-assisted custom web app (Tier 2): $500–2,000 + 40–80 hrs. Stripe + auth + Supabase backend.

cost_estimate.recommended_tier: Manual consulting first, then AI-assisted SaaS
cost_estimate.notes: Do NOT build until 3 consulting clients validate the framework. Revenue potential: $200–500/mo per institution × 20 = $4,000–10,000/mo. Concept validated Apr 5 2026.
Book Writing Agent live Sundays 7 PM. Dev editor: $2,000–5,000. Copy editor: $1,000–3,000. Cover + formatting: $500–2,000. Traditional publishing: free to query but 12–24 months longer.

agents.name: Content Scout
agents.purpose: Scans web/feeds for trending topics relevant to cardiac surgery PA niche; outputs content ideas to Discord
agents.notes: Writes content/weekly-brief.md after each run. Feeds LinkedIn + Instagram with unified weekly theme.

agents.name: LinkedIn Growth
agents.purpose: Drafts and queues LinkedIn posts targeting PA audience to build audience and drive course/consulting leads
agents.notes: Brief-aware: reads content/weekly-brief.md first. Scheduled: Apr 10 'Nobody Teaches You' · Apr 14 'Conduit Quality Training System'.

agents.name: Lead Magnet Builder
agents.purpose: Creates and distributes lead magnets (PDFs, templates) to grow email list and Teachable pipeline
agents.notes: Directly feeds MBA PA Academy enrollment funnel

agents.name: Course Architect
agents.purpose: Develops MBA PA Academy course content — scripts, lessons, curriculum refinements
agents.schedule_human: Every Monday 3:00 PM ET (weekly until May 12)
agents.notes: Weekly until May 12, then monthly. Course 1 focus. Course 2 build resumes post-travel.

agents.name: Consulting Outreach (Midweek)
agents.purpose: Identifies and drafts outreach messages to potential consulting clients in cardiac surgery/PA space
agents.notes: GPT-5.4 for warm lead judgment. 22 DMs sent total. 8 follow-ups due Apr 15.

agents.name: Consulting Outreach (Weekend)
agents.purpose: Sunday batch run for consulting outreach pipeline
agents.notes: Staggered to 7:30 PM to avoid Book Writing Session conflict at 7:00 PM.

agents.name: Network Outreach
agents.purpose: Manages warm outreach to PA network contacts for consulting pipeline and course beta
agents.notes: GPT-5.4 — direct revenue, personalization matters.

agents.name: Book Writing Session
agents.purpose: Structured book writing sessions for PA leadership/career book project
agents.notes: Long-term asset. Runs 30 min before Consulting Outreach Weekend — staggered.

agents.name: Instagram Content Agent
agents.purpose: Creates Instagram/Facebook content for MBA PA brand growth
agents.notes: Switched GPT-5.4 → Sonnet Apr 2 (writing lane). Brief-aware.

agents.name: Daily Cost Sentinel
agents.purpose: Analyzes daily spend, detects anomalies, updates ledger, delivers cost report
agents.notes: Timeout 300→600s fixed Apr 1. Collector runs at 7:45 AM for 15-min buffer.

agents.name: Daily Cost Collector
agents.purpose: Collects daily transaction data from OpenAI/Anthropic APIs and writes CSV for sentinel
agents.notes: Runs 15 min before sentinel.

agents.name: Cost Sentinel Renewal Check
agents.purpose: Checks for upcoming subscription renewals within 14 days and sends decision prompts
agents.notes: Runs 30 min after sentinel — good timing.

agents.name: Memory Governance Daily
agents.purpose: Validates memory files, processes promotion queue, enforces memory health rules
agents.notes: Fixed Apr 1. MEMORY.md trimmed from 24.2k → 13.1k on Apr 8 to prevent injection truncation.

agents.name: Backlog Intake Processor
agents.purpose: Processes new backlog entries, scores them, and updates backlog.md
agents.notes: Runs same time as Memory Governance — no conflict (different tasks).

agents.name: Weekly Metrics Digest
agents.purpose: Compiles weekly performance metrics across all agents and delivers summary to Discord
agents.notes: Runs at 6 PM, Backlog Review at 6:15 PM, Exec Summary at 6:30 PM — correct sequencing.

agents.name: Weekly Executive Summary
agents.purpose: High-level executive summary of the week: revenue progress, content output, system health
agents.notes: Sonnet appropriate — public-facing synthesis. 30 min after metrics digest.

agents.name: System Health Sentinel
agents.purpose: Weekly system audit: checks cron health, file integrity, exec status
agents.notes: Local model appropriate for mechanical checks.

agents.name: Nightly Backup
agents.purpose: Full local backup + git-safe mirror push to GitHub
agents.notes: Fixed Apr 1 — pre-commit secret leak check added.

agents.name: Launch Countdown Daily
agents.purpose: Daily Discord briefing: days to May 12 launch, modules done, today's priority action
outputs: Discord DM to Pol — daily launch countdown briefing
agents.notes: ⚠️ 1 consecutive error Apr 8. Needs diagnosis — likely delivery config.

agents.name: Competitive Monitor
agents.purpose: Weekly scan of competitive landscape — VesselHarvest, Chris Darst, adjacent PA education players. Writes to strategy/competitive-intel/.
agents.notes: First run: Apr 13. Strategy Office built Apr 8.

agents.name: CSO (Chief Strategy Officer)
agents.purpose: Weekly strategic review — synthesizes competitive intel, pipeline signals, and enforcer state into one directional verdict.
agents.notes: First run: Apr 13. Requires verdict — no summaries.

agents.name: Execution Enforcer
agents.purpose: Evaluates completion of current non-negotiable against 5-gate standard. Escalates to L1/L2/L3 blocking if incomplete.
agents.notes: First run: Apr 15. Will evaluate Mitesh call completion. 5-gate standard required.

agents.name: The Skeptic (Board)
agents.purpose: Monthly board agent. Challenges thesis, flags confirmation bias, stress-tests positioning claims.
agents.schedule_human: First Monday of month 9:15 AM ET
agents.notes: First run: May 4. Monthly cadence — first Monday only.

agents.name: The Investor (Board)
agents.purpose: Monthly board agent. Evaluates revenue trajectory, capital allocation, and ROI of active investments.
agents.schedule_human: First Monday of month 9:45 AM ET
agents.notes: First run: May 4.

agents.name: Offer Audit (Board)
agents.purpose: Monthly board agent. Audits all active offers for clarity, pricing, positioning, and conversion readiness.
agents.schedule_human: First Monday of month 10:15 AM ET
agents.notes: First run: May 4.

agents.name: Behavioral Learning — Weekly Patterns
agents.purpose: Analyzes registered LinkedIn posts for engagement patterns. Read-only output — no prompt changes without Pol approval.
agents.notes: 13 posts registered. Read-only — prompt changes require Pol approval.
